understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place selectable pieces onto all goal tiles simultaneously. I needed to maneuver pieces using movement and CLICK actions to achieve this, but I ran out of steps before solving the level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the currently selected piece by 3-pixel grid steps. CLICK actions are meant to switch control to another selectable piece, but in this level they consistently failed with 'Selected piece did not change position (blocked or action has no movement effect)'. This suggests the other selectable was blocked, enclosed, or somehow unreachable for selection. Walls and blocks appear to obstruct movement, and push interactions likely occur when pushed objects are adjacent, though I did not successfully push anything in these final turns.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place selectable pieces onto all goal tiles simultaneously. I needed to maneuver pieces using movement and CLICK actions to achieve this, but I ran out of steps before solving the level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the currently selected piece by 3-pixel grid steps. CLICK actions are meant to switch control to another selectable piece, but in this level they consistently failed with 'Selected piece did not change position (blocked or action has no movement effect)'. This suggests the other selectable was blocked, enclosed, or somehow unreachable for selection. Walls and blocks appear to obstruct movement, and push interactions likely occur when pushed objects are adjacent, though I did not successfully push anything in these final turns.
